summary: Phase 2.0 (Planning Gate of Phase 2 — Map Generation) complete. Decision memo authored, architecture-red-team review identified four blocking issues (B1 base64url alphabet/padding + missed reuse, B2 null-field handling, B3 strict-vs-lax parsing, B4 RunStreams contract change + singleton-vs-subset contradiction) and six non-blocking concerns; all four blockers and all six non-blockers are addressed in an in-memo addendum that overrides conflicting prose. The two Phase 1 carry-forward follow-ups explicitly tagged 'before Phase 2 sim code lands' have landed: (#2) eslint-rules/no-float-arithmetic invalid-fixture count expanded from 20 → 27, and (#8) encodeAction tag-order combinatoric test added that walks all 2^3 = 8 subsets of optional Action fields {target, item, dir} plus a sentinel test asserting the test's FIELDS list covers every TAG_* exported from encode.ts. PHASES.md was updated to formally split Phase 2 into Phase 2.0 (planning gate), Phase 2.A (sandbox-verifiable implementation), and Phase 2.B (live deploy verification), with original Phase 2 acceptance criteria partitioned across 2.A (5 criteria) and 2.B (1 criterion) and new 2.A criteria added for the property-style reachability sweep (red-team N4) and bundle-report artifact upload (red-team N5). Phase 2.A implementation may begin in the next phase cycle.
suggested_commit_message: phase-2.0: planning gate (decision memo + red-team + addendum + Phase 1 carry-forwards)

verification_sprint.purpose: Confirm Phase 1 (1.A + 1.B) foundation has not drifted before opening Phase 2 work.
verification_sprint.unit_tests: 167 passed (vitest run --coverage); 100% lines / 100% statements / 100% functions on src/core/*; branch 95.97% (uncovered branches limited to self-test.ts lines 59, 63-64, 113-129, unchanged from the Phase 1 baseline)
verification_sprint.primary_workflow: Phase 2.0 ships no user-facing code (planning gate posture); the primary workflow remains the live https://porkchop.github.io/icefall/ diagnostic page, last verified green in commit 2038fc9 per Phase 1.B approval. Phase 2.A will extend the diagnostic page; Phase 2.B will re-verify it live.

code_review_2.evidence: eslint-rules/no-float-arithmetic.test.ts; vitest reports 42 tests in the eslint-rules suite (15 valid + 27 invalid, where each fixture surfaces as its own test)

code_review_8.description: unit test that asserts encodeAction emits optional fields in strictly increasing tag order across all 2^k field-presence combinations
code_review_8.sentinel_added: test asserting Object.keys(encodeMod).filter(k => k.startsWith('TAG_')).length === FIELDS.length, so a future TAG_* addition to encode.ts forces a corresponding FIELDS update or the test fails
code_review_8.evidence: src/core/encode.test.ts; vitest reports 28 tests in the encode suite (was 20 pre-Phase-2.0)

phase_2_0_acceptance_criteria_added: decision-memo-phase-2.md exists and was reviewed by architecture-red-team before any Phase 2 implementation code is written
red-team review at artifacts/red-team-phase-2.md exists; any blocking issues are addressed via an in-memo addendum
Phase 1 carry-forward follow-ups #2 and #8 land before Phase 2.A code begins
phase_2_A_acceptance_criteria_partitione: same (seed, floor) → same floor (golden test on 20-pair fixture pack)
exactly one entrance + exactly one exit per floor (floor 10 has entrance + boss room)
all rooms reachable from entrance (runtime invariant + 200-seed property sweep)
floor 10 structurally distinguished (boss arena reachable from entrance)
mapgen consumes only streams.mapgen(floorN) — runtime per-call delta guard + lint rule + browser self-test
phase_2_A_acceptance_criteria_added_from: all frozen contracts established by the decision memo (tile codes, JSON shape, registry IDs, ASCII char mapping, base64url alphabet, always-present null-fields, strict parser, seedToBytes) have at least one regression-failing test
bundle size budget: dist/-gzipped ≤ 75 KB; bundle-report uploaded as a CI artifact
npm ci && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:e2e all green inside the sandbox
phase_2_B_acceptance_criteria_partitione: live GitHub Pages URL serves the updated diagnostic page with the in-browser ASCII floor preview working
phase_2_B_acceptance_criteria_added_from: Phase 2.B Playwright job exercises the preview UI (set seed, set floor, click Generate floor, assert window.__FLOOR_PREVIEW__ === 'ready', assert rendered ASCII matches expected golden output) on chromium / firefox / webkit

drift_detection.purpose: audit prior phases for overlap with Phase 2 work
findings: src/mapgen/ does not exist yet — no implementation drift to reconcile
src/registries/ does not exist yet — no registry drift to reconcile

eslint.config.js already scopes src/mapgen/** with the determinism rules (no-float-arithmetic, FORBIDDEN_TIME, SIM_UNORDERED, no-restricted-imports excluding render+input). Phase 2.A will extend this with a tools/** scope and a streams.sim/streams.ui import ban for src/mapgen/**.
tools/ does not exist yet; the addendum (resolution of N1) classifies Phase 2 as the establisher of the tools/ boundary, not an inheritor of a Phase-4-precedent that does not yet exist
src/core/hash.ts:base64url already exists (RFC 4648 §5, unpadded); the addendum (resolution of B1) requires its reuse rather than a new module

src/core/streams.ts:streamsForRun returns RunStreams as { mapgen, sim, ui }; the addendum (resolution of B4) classifies the additive __consumed extension as a Phase 1 addendum, applied during Phase 2.A

next_phase: Phase 2.A — sandbox-verifiable implementation. Will write src/mapgen/, src/registries/, src/core/seed.ts (or merge into streams.ts), extend src/core/streams.ts with __consumed tracker, extend src/core/self-test.ts with two new self-tests (mapgen-cross-runtime-digest, mapgen-stream-isolation), tools/gen-floor.ts CLI, tools/gen-fixtures.ts regenerator, 20-pair fixture pack at tests/fixtures/floors/, extend src/main.ts diagnostic page with the ASCII preview UI, extend eslint.config.js with tools/** scope and streams.sim/streams.ui import ban for src/mapgen/**, update docs/ARCHITECTURE.md with the new layer/contract additions, and configure CI to upload the bundle-report artifact. Phase 2.A is gated by the addendum-pinned frozen contracts (items 1–13) and acceptance criteria above.
